Our Offerings

Everything You Need for a Perfect Event

Spacious Event Halls

Two distinct halls — Beatrice Hall for 150 guests and B&B Hall for up to 1,200 — offering the right scale for every occasion.

Suites & Accommodation

Comfortable and spacious suite options for event hosts, families, and overnight guests — from cozy 1-bedroom stays to full 2-bedroom suites with kitchens.

24-Hour Power Supply

Reliable round-the-clock electricity ensures uninterrupted events, comfortable accommodation, and peace of mind for every guest.

Ample Parking Space

Secure and adequate parking available for all guests and visitors attending events or staying at our suites.

2
Grand
Halls
Who We Are

A premium event and hospitality centre built for elegance, comfort, and every occasion.

Regal Heights Supreme Hall & Suites is more than a venue — it is an experience. We were founded on the belief that every gathering, no matter the size, deserves a setting that inspires, impresses, and endures in memory.

From intimate private celebrations to grand weddings, corporate conferences, church programmes, and concerts, we have crafted a space that serves every need with the same unwavering standard of excellence — spacious halls, quality accommodation, reliable power, and a team dedicated to your success.

Elegance
Comfort
Reliability
Our Philosophy

We believe every occasion — however grand or intimate — deserves a space that elevates the moment. At Regal Heights, we provide not just a venue, but a complete hospitality experience built on warmth, reliability, and distinction.

Our Promise

A Standard of Timeless Hospitality

Dedicated Support

Our team is on hand from booking to event day, ensuring every arrangement is handled with care and professionalism.

General Kitchen Access

A functional kitchen space with cooking pots and gas supply is available for food preparation during your event (charged separately).

Uninterrupted Power

24-hour electricity supply keeps your event running smoothly, ensuring no disruptions to lighting, sound, or air conditioning.

Secure Parking

Ample and well-managed parking space ensures convenience and comfort for all guests arriving at your event.

Our Spaces

Halls, Suites & Accommodation

Two exceptional event halls and three carefully appointed accommodation suites — everything you need, all under one roof.

Intimate Event Hall
Beatrice Hall

An elegant and intimate event space perfect for birthdays, bridal showers, meetings, seminars, private parties, and smaller social gatherings. Classy, comfortable, and designed for memorable experiences.

Up to 150 guests
All-day hire
Changing room available upon request at additional cost.
Book Beatrice Hall
Grand Event Hall
B&B Hall

Our flagship grand event space designed for weddings, receptions, conferences, concerts, church programmes, corporate events, and large celebrations. A spacious, premium environment for both guests and organizers.

Up to 1,200 guests
All-day hire
Complimentary changing room included with every B&B Hall booking.
Book B&B Hall
Accommodation
1 Bedroom Suite

A cozy and comfortable suite with a private lounge — designed for relaxation, privacy, and convenience. Ideal for event hosts or individual guests seeking a comfortable overnight stay.

1 Bedroom + Lounge
24hr Power
₦50,000 / night
Book This Suite
Accommodation – Most Spacious
2 Bedroom Suite

A premium accommodation package with two bedrooms, a spacious lounge, and a full kitchen — perfect for families, event hosts, or group stays requiring added space and comfort.

2 Beds + Lounge + Kitchen
24hr Power
₦120,000 / night
Book This Suite
Accommodation
1 Bedroom + Kitchen Suite

A stylish and spacious suite with a bedroom, a generous lounge, and a kitchen — offering that extra layer of comfort and convenience for longer stays or event hosts who need more room.

1 Bed + Lounge + Kitchen
24hr Power
₦70,000 / night

What We Host

Events & Services

01
Weddings & Receptions

Celebrate your union in B&B Hall — our grand 1,200-capacity space sets the perfect stage for wedding ceremonies and receptions. With a complimentary changing room, ample parking, and 24-hour power, your big day is in excellent hands.

Ceremony Setup Changing Room 1,200 Capacity 24hr Power
02
Corporate Events & Conferences

From conferences and seminars to product launches and annual general meetings — B&B Hall provides a professional, spacious environment that reflects your brand's credibility and ambition.

Conferences Seminars Product Launches AGMs
03
Birthdays & Private Parties

Whether it's an intimate birthday in Beatrice Hall or a grand celebration in B&B Hall, we create the atmosphere for your milestone. Bridal showers, anniversary parties, and private gatherings are all equally at home here.

Birthdays Bridal Showers Anniversaries Private Parties
04
Church & Community Programmes

B&B Hall's grand scale makes it an ideal venue for church programmes, community gatherings, concerts, and cultural events. Spacious, well-powered, and equipped to welcome large congregations with comfort.

Church Programmes Concerts Cultural Events Community Fairs
